title: UI - Successful login with valid credentials
description: Verify that a user can successfully log in using a valid username and password.
preconditions: User is on the login page

steps.expectedResult: User is redirected to the dashboard/home page.

expectedOutcome: User is authenticated and session token/cookie is created.

title: UI - Login failure with invalid credentials
description: Verify that login fails and an error message is displayed when invalid credentials are provided.
preconditions: User is on the login page
expectedOutcome: Visible error message indicating invalid credentials appears.

title: UI - Validation for mandatory fields
description: Verify that the application prevents submission with empty required fields.
preconditions: User is on the login page
expectedOutcome: User sees validation messages for required fields.

title: UI - Login attempt with locked account
description: Verify that locked accounts are prevented from logging in with a specific message.
preconditions: Account 'locked.user@example.com' is in a locked state
expectedOutcome: Specific error message regarding account lock is displayed.

title: UI - Password field character masking
description: Verify that the password field masks characters for security.

steps.action: Type characters into the password input
steps.expectedResult: Characters are not visible as plain text.

expectedOutcome: Input type is 'password' or visually obscured.
